title: reconcile output data
description: Shape of the `data` field on a successful `reconcile --run-id <id> --scheduler {sge|slurm}` envelope.

lifecycle_state.description: Reconcile flips to 'abandoned' when recorded job_ids are non-empty but none are alive on the scheduler.

last_status.description: Refreshed snapshot from the cluster-side reporter. Same shape as poll-run-status's last_status.
